assertions.assertion: Output is a valid .agent.md file with YAML frontmatter
assertions.evidence: File begins with '---' and includes 'name', 'description', 'tools' fields

assertions.assertion: Description is written in third person
Tools list contains only read operations
assertions.evidence: Tools include read_file/grep_search but exclude write_file, run_in_terminal, etc.

assertions.assertion: Mission statement is one imperative sentence
assertions.evidence: Body opens with a single imperative-verb sentence defining the agent's purpose

assertions.assertion: Non-goals section explicitly excludes file modification
assertions.evidence: Body contains 'Non-goals' or 'Does not' section mentioning file changes
Output explicitly names or describes the over-broad role problem

assertions.assertion: Skill suggests splitting into specialized agents
assertions.evidence: Output proposes two or more named sub-agents with distinct roles
Output does not contain a single frontmatter block listing all four capabilities

assertions.assertion: Skill identifies all missing required fields
assertions.evidence: Output lists: non-goals, output format, completion criteria, tool list

assertions.assertion: Skill asks clarifying questions before rewriting
assertions.evidence: Output contains questions about purpose, tools, or scope

assertions.assertion: Rewritten description is in third person
assertions.evidence: No first-person pronouns in the improved description field
